name: Robert Alda
abstract: Robert Alda (born Alfonso Giovanni Giuseppe Roberto D'Abruzzo; February 26, 1914 – May 3, 1986) was an American actor, singer and dancer. He was the father of actors Alan and Antony Alda.

concerts.label: United Parents Spring Benefit for the Children of Greater New York

about_quotes.evidence: The original Guys and Dolls, with Robert Alda, Vivian Blaine, Tom Petty, B. S. Pulley, Stubby Kaye.
